title: Google Play Store Subscriptions Class Action Settlement
description: You may be included in this settlement if you paid for at least one renewal term of a Google subscription sold through the Google Play store between May 30, 2014 and October 27, 2019.

qualifying_questions.text: Did you pay for at least one renewal of a Google Play Store subscription during this period?

title: RevitaLash / RevitaBrow Serum Class Action Settlement
description: Settlement for purchasers of RevitaLash or RevitaBrow eyelash and eyebrow serums in the U.S. between January 1, 2017 and December 29, 2025 (Rush v. Athena Cosmetics). See official site for eligibility.

title: Sirius XM TCPA / Do Not Call Class Action Settlement
description: Proposed settlement for consumers who received more than one telemarketing call from Sirius XM within a 12-month period between April 27, 2019 and October 31, 2025 while on a do-not-call list (Campbell et al. v. Sirius XM Radio Inc.). See official notice for eligibility.

title: Comcast / Xfinity Data Breach Class Action Settlement
description: Settlement for U.S. residents notified of the October 2023 Comcast data breach (Hasson v. Comcast, et al.). See official site for class definition and claim options.

title: RevitaLash Serum Class Action Settlement
description: You may be included in this settlement if you bought RevitaLash lash or brow serums between January 1, 2017 and December 29, 2025.

title: Sirius XM Radio - Unwanted Calls Class Action Settlement
description: You may be included in this settlement if you received more than one unwanted call from or on behalf of Sirius XM within a 12-month period between April 27, 2019 and October 31, 2025.

title: Lincoln University - COVID Tuition Class Action Settlement
description: If you were a student enrolled at Lincoln University for the Spring 2020 semester, did not withdraw by March 12, 2020 and were not fully refunded for tuition or fees, you may be included in this settlement.

title: Domestic Flight Antitrust Class Action Settlement
description: This settlement covers those who bought domestic airline tickets from Delta, Southwest, United, Continental, or US Airways between July 1, 2011 and December 2017 and between July 1, 2011 and June 14, 2018 from American Airlines.

title: NIBCO Class Action Settlement
description: If you own or owned a building (commercial or residential) containing NIBCO's Pex tubing, fittings or clamps anytime after January 1, 2005, you may be able to claim a piece of this settlement.

title: Zonolite Vermiculite Attic Insulation Class Action Settlement
description: If Zonolite attic insulation was installed in a structure that you own(ed) or rent(ed) and you had to pay any costs related to its removal, you may be able to claim a piece of this settlement.

title: Ford - PowerShift Transmissions Class Action Settlement
description: This settlement covers current and former 2011-2016 Fiesta and 2012-2016 Focus owners and lessees who had issues with their PowerShift transmissions.

title: My Little Steamer Class Action Settlement
description: This settlement aims to cover anyone who purchased a Joy/JM-branded My Little Steamer between January 1, 2002 and December 31, 2020.

title: Nissan - CVT Transmissions Class Action Settlement
description: You may be included in this settlement if you owned or leased a 2014-2018 Rogue, 2015-2018 Pathfinder or a 2015-2018 Infiniti QX60.

title: Theranos Blood Testing Services Class Action Settlement
description: If you paid for Theranos blood testing services out-of-pocket, through health insurance, or through any other source between November 2013 and June 2016, you may be included in this settlement.

title: Boohoo - Advertised Sales Class Action Settlement
description: You may be included in this settlement if you bought products from Boohoo, BoohooMAN, PrettyLittleThing or Nasty Gal outside of California between April 1, 2016 and June 17, 2022.

title: Washington Nationals - Discount Tickets Class Action Settlement
description: You may be included in this settlement if you bought a Washington Nationals ticket in the 2023 or 2024 season and were not eligible for the “Millennial” or “Young Professional” discount due to being 40 or older.

title: Kia - Engine Failure Class Action Settlement
description: Drivers who bought or leased certain 2010–2020 Kia vehicles may be covered by this settlement.

vehicles.model: vehicles may be covered by this settlement

title: Branford Manor Class Action Settlement
description: You may be included in this settlement if you were listed on the rental forms at Branford Manor at some point between November 23, 2019 and November 22, 2022.

title: CertainTeed Organic Shingles Class Action Settlement
description: Class members are defined as owners of buildings with CertainTeed Organic Shingles manufactured after July 1, 1987. The settlement provides compensation for the cost of replacing the roof, dependent upon damage.

title: Sanyo Energy - Solar Panels Class Action Settlement
description: You may be covered by this settlement if you bought solar panels from Sanyo or if you bought a residence or building with the panels already installed.

title: GM - Fuel Pumps Class Action Settlement
description: You may be covered by this settlement if you bought a 2011-2016 Duramax diesel Chevrolet Silverado or GMC Sierra from a GM-authorized dealer in California, Florida, Illinois, Iowa, New York, Pennsylvania, or Texas.

title: Kaiser Permanente - Out-of-Network Claims (California) Class Action Settlement
description: You may be included in this settlement if you were a Kaiser Permanente member and paid for out-of-network mental health/substance use disorder care because you attempted but couldn’t access in-network care after January 1, 2021.

title: St. Stephen’s Cemetery (Kentucky) Class Action Settlement
description: You may be included in this settlement if you bought or are the next of kin or the surviving spouse of a person who purchased a burial plot or services from St. Stephen’s Cemetery between January 1, 1992 and February 24, 2017.

title: Ram Trucks - Anti-Lock Braking System Class Action Settlement
description: This settlement covers current owners or lessees of certain 2017-2018 Ram 2500, 3500, 4500 and 5500 models built between April 1, 2017 and December 29, 2018.

title: Huuuge Casino - Mobile Games Class Action Settlement
description: If you made a purchase through Huuuge Casino or Billionaire Casino on or before January 23, 2025, you may be covered by this settlement.

title: Dodge Grand Caravan - Sliding Doors Class Action Settlement
description: You may be included in this settlement if you bought or leased a 2017-2018 Dodge Grand Caravan built between January 1, 2017 and December 31, 2017.

title: NYC Taxi and Limousine Commission Class Action Settlement
description: If you were a taxi or for-hire vehicle driver whose license was suspended by the NYC Taxi and Limousine Commission based on having been arrested on a criminal charge between June 28, 2003 and February 18, 2020, you may be included in this settlement.

title: Breckenridge - Duloxetine Future Refund Program Class Action Settlement
description: This website is for those who wish to make a claim to receive compensation for out-of-pocket costs paid for unused, returned Breckenridge duloxetine that is subject to a product recall occurring after May 22, 2025.

title: Hyundai, Kia - Vehicle Theft Class Action Settlement
description: You may be included in this settlement if you owned or leased certain 2011-2022 Hyundai or Kia vehicles that were stolen or almost stolen on or after April 29, 2025.

title: Hyundai, Kia - Airbag Control Units Class Action Settlement
description: This settlement includes those who, as of April 14, 2025, owned or leased certain Hyundai or Kia models. You can find the full list of vehicles on the settlement website.

title: Service Spot - Parking Reservation Fees (California) Class Action Settlement
description: If you made a booking on ParkOn.com or CheapAirportParking.org between July 1, 2024 and June 9, 2025 and paid a mandatory reservation fee as a California resident, you may be included in this settlement.

title: Toyota - Airbag Control Units Class Action Settlement
description: This settlement covers current and former owners and lessees of certain 2011-2019 Toyota vehicles. The full list of affected vehicles can be found on the settlement website.

title: Hearthside Food Solutions - Labor Laws (Illinois) Class Action Settlement
description: This settlement covers those who worked at a Hearthside Food Solutions facility in Illinois while under the age of 16 between March 1, 2020 and December 4, 2024.

title: Whirlpool Refrigerators - Wire Harness Issue Class Action Settlement
description: You may be included in this settlement if you bought a side-by-side refrigerator manufactured by Whirlpool from 2018-2021, including certain Whirlpool, Maytag, KitchenAid, and JennAir brand refrigerators.

title: Toyota IC Forklift Class Action Settlement
description: You may be included in this settlement if you bought or leased an IC Toyota forklift on or before January 20, 2026.

vehicles.model: IC Forklift Class Action Settlement You may be included in this settlement if you bought

title: Tinder Age Discrimination (California) Class Action Settlement
description: You may be included in this settlement if you paid for Tinder Plus or Tinder Gold in California when you were over the age of 29 at any time between March 2, 2015 and February 10, 2019.

title: Hard Rock Stadium - Copa America Final Class Action Settlement
description: You may be included in this settlement if you were a ticketholder to the July 14, 2024 Copa America Final and were denied access to the stadium or were admitted but denied access to stadium facilities or to your specific seats.

title: PHH - Mortgage Service Kickbacks Class Action Settlement
description: You may be included in this settlement if you obtained residential mortgage loans that originated or were acquired by PHH or its affiliates between January 1, 2007 and December 31, 2009 and purchased private mortgage insurance in connection with the loan.

title: Sprouts Farmers Market - Receipts Class Action Settlement
description: You may be included in this settlement if you used your personal credit or debit card at a Sprouts grocery store in the United States and had more than the last five digits of your card number printed on the receipt.

title: Shimano Crankset Recall Class Action Settlement
description: You may be included in this settlement if you bought, received or owned a Shimano bicycle crankset manufactured before July 2019.

title: Traeger Pellet Grills (California, Utah) Class Action Settlement
description: You may be included in this settlement if you bought wood pellets made by Traeger Pellet Grills in California or Utah after October 1, 2015.

title: Amazon Prime - FTC Case Class Action Settlement
description: You may be able to claim a piece of this settlement if you were unintentionally enrolled into a Prime membership between June 23, 2019 and June 23, 2025.

title: Nutramax - Cosequin (California) Class Action Settlement
description: If you live in California and purchased certain dog Cosequin products between May 3, 2016 and May 6, 2022, you may be included in this settlement.

title: Robinhood - Order Flow Class Action Settlement
description: This settlement covers Robinhood customers who placed certain qualifying trades between September 1, 2016 and September 1, 2018.

title: Concord Orthopaedics - Data Breach Class Action Settlement
description: You may be able to claim a piece of this settlement if your private information was accessed in the November 2024 Concord Orthopaedics Professional Association data breach.

title: Tom’s of Maine - Toothpaste Class Action Settlement
description: You may be able to claim a piece of this settlement if you bought one or more Tom’s of Maine toothpaste between November 21, 2020 and March 6, 2026.

title: LastPass - Data Breach Class Action Settlement
description: You may be included in this settlement if your personal information was exposed in the 2022 LastPass data breach.

title: Cardiovascular Consultants - Data Breach Class Action Settlement
description: This settlement covers those whose personal information was compromised by the September 2023 Cardiovascular Consultants data breach.

title: Beef - Indirect Purchasers Class Action Settlement
description: You may be included in this settlement if you bought beef products between August 1, 2014 and December 31, 2019 to feed yourself, family or friends.

title: Athena Bitcoin - Unwanted Texts Class Action Settlement
description: You may be included in this settlement if you received text messages from Athena Bitcoin between August 20, 2020 and August 20, 2024 after sending a "stop" request.

title: St. Louis Medium Security Institution Class Action Settlement
description: You may be included in this settlement if you were detained in the St. Louis Medium Security Institution for three or more consecutive days between November 13, 2012 and June 30, 2022.

title: Evening Post Publishing - Data Breach Class Action Settlement
description: You may be included in this settlement if your private information was compromised in the March 2024 Evening Post Publishing data breach.

title: Krispy Kreme - Data Breach Class Action Settlement
description: You may be included in this settlement if your personal information was exposed in the Krispy Kreme data breach discovered in November 2024.

title: Lakeview Loan Servicing - Data Breach Class Action Settlement
description: You may be included in this settlement if your personal information was exposed in a data breach affecting Lakeview Loan Servicing.

title: Avis Rent a Car - Data Breach Class Action Settlement
description: You may be included in this settlement if you were notified that your personal information was impacted by the August 2024 Avis Rent a Car data breach.

title: Complete Payroll Solutions - Data Breach Class Action Settlement
description: You may be covered by this settlement if your personal information may have been compromised in the Complete Payroll Solutions data breach discovered in March 2024.

title: Anova Culinary - Data Privacy (California) Class Action Settlement
description: You may be entitled to a piece of this settlement if you had a shipping or billing address in California and bought merchandise with a credit card on Anova Culinary's website or app.

title: Grubhub - Delivery Drivers (California) Class Action Settlement
description: This settlement covers those who entered into an agreement with Grubhub to use the platform as an independent contractor and completed at least one delivery in California between December 3, 2014 and March 13, 2026.

title: Boston Sports Club - COVID Fees Class Action Settlement
description: You may be included in this settlement if you are a Mass. resident billed by Boston Sports Club during the COVID-19 pandemic for services that were not provided.

title: SouthState Bank - Data Breach Class Action Settlement
description: If you were notified that your personal information was potentially impacted in a February 2024 data breach involving SouthState Bank, you may be covered by this settlement.

title: Mizuno - Data Breach Class Action Settlement
description: You may be covered by this settlement if you received notice that your personal information was potentially exposed in the Mizuno data breach discovered in November 2024.

title: OrthopedicsNY - Data Breach Class Action Settlement
description: You may be covered by this settlement if you received notice that your private information may have been exposed in the December 2023 OrthopedicsNY data breach.

title: HEXPOL Compounding Americas - Data Breach Class Action Settlement
description: You may be included in this settlement if your private information was compromised in the December 2024 HEXPOL Compounding Americas and HEXPOL Holding data breach.

title: Centrelake Medical Group - Data Breach (California) Class Action Settlement
description: You may be included in this settlement if you were a Centrelake Medical Group patient with a California address and received a data breach notice in April 2019.

title: Patelco Credit Union - Data Breach Class Action Settlement
description: You may be included in this settlement if you were notified by Patelco Credit Union about a June 2024 data breach.

title: Excelsior Orthopaedics, Buffalo Surgery Center - Data Breach Class Action Settlement
description: You may be included in this settlement if your personal information was potentially accessible as a result of the data breach affecting Excelsior Orthopaedics and Buffalo Surgery Center.

title: Boostrix Vaccination (New York) Class Action Settlement
description: You may be included in this settlement if you lived in New York and were vaccinated with Boostrix or received the vaccination in the state between May 20, 2016 and May 20, 2020 after viewing certain advertisements about the vaccine.

title: University of Southern California - Fees Class Action Settlement
description: If you were a student at the University of Southern California who, at any time between July 14, 2016 and March 4, 2026, was charged certain late fees, you may be included in this settlement.

title: Cadence Bank - MOVEit Data Breach Class Action Settlement
description: You may be covered by this settlement if you were notified that your personal information may have been exposed in the May 2023 MOVEit data breach that affected Cadence Bank.

title: CommuniCare - Foreign-Trained Nurses Class Action Settlement
description: You may be included in this settlement if you are a foreign-trained nurse who was sponsored by CommuniCare in the immigration process between February 17, 2013 and October 1, 2025.

title: AbleTo - Unwanted Calls Class Action Settlement
description: This settlement covers current and former Aetna members who received a prerecorded voicemail from AbleTo between September 29, 2019 and February 2, 2026.

title: Tangoe US - Data Breach Class Action Settlement
description: You may be covered by this settlement if your private information was compromised in the November 2022 Tangoe US data breach.

title: First Chatham Bank - Data Breach Class Action Settlement
description: If your private information was compromised in the September 2024 First Chatham Bank data breach, you may be included in this settlement.

title: NCAA - Volunteer Coach Class Action Settlement
description: This settlement includes those who worked for an NCAA Division I sports program other than baseball as a volunteer coach between March 17, 2019 and June 30, 2023.

title: Valsartan, Losartan, Irbesartan Class Action Settlement
description: You may be included in this settlement if you paid for Hetero Valsartan, Aurobindo Irbesartan, or Vivimed Losartan medications between January 1, 2016 and the present.

title: Leasing Expenses Co. Class Action Settlement
description: You may be able to claim a piece of this settlement if Leasing Expenses Co. entered into a lease with you or your business or collected money from you or your business to pay a lease.

title: Essen Medical - Data Breach Class Action Settlement
description: You may be included in this settlement if you received notice stating that your personal information may have been compromised in the March 2023 Essen Medical data breach.

title: Mason Construction - Data Breach Class Action Settlement
description: You may be able to claim a piece of this settlement if your private information was implicated in the January 2024 Mason Construction data breach.

title: Balance Autism - Data Breach Class Action Settlement
description: You may be included in this settlement if your personal data was potentially compromised in the March 2025 Balance Autism data breach.

title: Roush Fenway Keselowski Racing - Data Breach Class Action Settlement
description: You may be included in this settlement if your personal information was compromised in the May 2025 Roush Fenway Keselowski Racing data breach.

title: Toyota Camry HVAC (California) Class Action Settlement
description: This settlement covers current and former 2012-2015 Toyota Camry XV50 owners and lessees in California.

title: Veeam Management - Job Postings (Washington) Class Action Settlement
description: You may be able to claim a piece of this settlement if you applied for a job with Veeam Management in Washington between January 1, 2023 and March 2, 2026.

title: Ardagh Glass - Job Postings (Washington) Class Action Settlement
description: You may be able to claim a piece of this settlement if you applied for a job with Ardagh Glass in Washington between January 1, 2023 and March 2, 2026.

title: Rudeen Management Company (Washington) Class Action Settlement
description: If you were a tenant at a Washington residential property between August 10, 2014 and May 19, 2023 that was owned or managed by Rudeen Management Company and you did not receive your full security deposit refund, you may be covered by this settlement.

title: Google - Android Operating System Class Action Settlement
description: You may be included in this settlement if you used an Android mobile device to access the internet through a cellular network between November 12, 2017 and the present.

title: Proliance Surgeons - Data Breach Class Action Settlement
description: You may be included in this settlement if your private information was compromised in the February 2023 Proliance Surgeons data breach.

title: Rebound Orthopedics & Neurosurgery - Data Breach Class Action Settlement
description: If your personal information was potentially compromised in the February 2024 Rebound Orthopedics & Neurosurgery data breach, you may be covered by this settlement.

title: Interactive Brokers Class Action Settlement
description: You may be included in this settlement if you had a margin account with Interactive Brokers that was liquidated in whole or part by Interactive Brokers using certain software between December 18, 2013 and July 14, 2025.

title: General Physician, P.C. - Data Breach Class Action Settlement
description: You may be included in this settlement if your private information may have been impacted in a data breach that General Physician, P.C. experienced between April 6, 2024 and June 12, 2024.

title: PowerSchool Holdings - Student Privacy Class Action Settlement
description: You may be able to claim a piece of this settlement if you or your minor child, as a student, logged into the Naviance platform at least once between August 18, 2021 and January 23, 2026.

title: Port Liberté Condominiums (New Jersey) Class Action Settlement
description: You may be included in this settlement if you lived in a condominium unit in one of the eight buildings within the Port Liberté community in Jersey City, New Jersey.

title: Capital One Financial Corporation Associate Savings Plan Class Action Settlement
defendant: Capital One Financial Corporation Associate Savings Plan
description: If you were a participant or beneficiary of the Capital One Financial Corporation Associate Savings Plan between November 11, 2018 and January 13, 2026, you may be included in this settlement.

title: Myers Auto Group - Data Breach Class Action Settlement
description: You may be included in this settlement if your personal information was impacted by the May 2025 Myers Auto Group data breach.

title: M&R Printing Equipment - Data Breach Class Action Settlement
description: You may be covered by this settlement if your private information was compromised in the June 2024 M&R Printing Equipment data breach.

title: Lee Enterprises - Data Breach Class Action Settlement
description: You may be included in this settlement if your private information was compromised in the February 2025 Lee Enterprises data breach.

title: Clackamas County - Property Foreclosures (Oregon) Class Action Settlement
description: You may be included in this settlement if you owned a property that was foreclosed on and sold or retained by Clackamas County for the non-payment of property taxes.

title: Splunk - Job Postings (Washington) Class Action Settlement
description: You may be included in this settlement if you applied for a job opening with Splunk LLC or Cisco Systems in Washington between January 1, 2023 and July 26, 2025.

title: Akeela - Data Breach Class Action Settlement
description: You may be covered by this settlement if your private information was compromised in the June 2023 Akeela data breach.

title: Christian Dior - Data Breach Class Action Settlement
description: You may be covered by this settlement if you were notified that your personal information may have been accessed in the January 2025 Christian Dior data breach.

title: Stoner Cats NFTs Class Action Settlement
description: If you purchased Stoner Cats NFTs from Stoner Cats 2, LLC in the offering on July 27, 2021, you may be included in this settlement.

title: Mitsubishi - Airbag Control Units Class Action Settlement
description: You may be included in this settlement if you owned or leased certain Mitsubishi Lancer or Outlander vehicles as of November 1, 2024.

title: Infiniti of Clarendon Hills - Unwanted Texts Class Action Settlement
description: You may be included in this settlement if you received at least one text message or call from Infiniti of Clarendon Hills, an auto dealer in Illinois, when your number was listed on the National Do Not Call Registry.

title: Hartford Insurance - Underinsured Motorist Insurance (New Mexico) Class Action Settlement
description: If you were a New Mexico policyholder or had underinsured motorist coverage with Property and Casualty Insurance Company of Hartford or Hartford Insurance Company of the Midwest, you may be covered by this settlement.

title: Amica Mutual - Underinsured Motorist Coverage Class Action Settlement
description: If you had uninsured or underinsured motorist coverage with Amica Mutual Insurance Company you may be covered by this settlement.

title: St. Andrew’s Resources for Seniors System - Data Breach Class Action Settlement
defendant: St. Andrew’s Resources for Seniors System
description: This settlement covers individuals whose personal information was exposed in the February 2024 St. Andrew’s Resources for Seniors System data breach.

title: LA Times - Data Privacy (California) Class Action Settlement
description: You may be included in this settlement if you accessed LA Times online via its website or app in California between January 31, 2023 and December 19, 2025.

title: Ingram Micro Americas - Data Breach Class Action Settlement
description: If your private information was compromised in the July 2025 Ingram Micro Americas data breach, you may be able to claim a piece of this settlement.

title: American Express - Antitrust Class Action Settlement
description: If you used your Visa or Mastercard debit card or Visa, Mastercard, or Discover non-rewards credit card to make a purchase between 2015 and 2022, you may be affected by this settlement.

title: Wilshire Law Firm - Unwanted Calls Class Action Settlement
description: You may be included in this settlement if you received a pre-recoded message to your cell phone from Wilshire Law Firm between October 10, 2020 and February 18, 2026.

title: Differin - Acne Treatment Class Action Settlement
description: You may be included in this settlement if you purchased Differin branded acne treatment in the United States between January 1, 2020 and February 19, 2026.

title: 301 Scrubs Investors - Data Breach Class Action Settlement
description: This settlement covers those who had their personal information exposed due to the June 2024 data breach affecting 301 Scrubs Investors.

title: Long Island Plastic Surgical Group - Data Breach Class Action Settlement
description: You may be included in this settlement if your personal information was potentially exposed in the January 2024 Long Island Plastic Surgical Group data breach.

title: Evergreen Alliance Golf Limited - Job Postings (Washington) Class Action Settlement
description: You may be included in this settlement if you applied for a job at Evergreen Alliance Golf Limited in Washington between January 1, 2023 and February 2, 2026.

title: P&S Transportation - Data Breach Class Action Settlement
description: You may be included in this settlement if your personal information was potentially exposed in the February 2024 P&S Transportation data breach.

title: Kittles Home Furnishings - Data Breach Class Action Settlement
description: You may be able to claim a piece of this settlement if your personal information was accessed without authorization in a February 2023 Kittles Home Furnishings data breach.

title: Discover Card - Misclassified Transactions Class Action Settlement
description: This settlement covers end merchants, merchant acquirers and payment intermediaries involved in processing or accepting a misclassified card transaction between January 1, 2007 and December 31, 2023.

title: Norton Healthcare - Data Breach Class Action Settlement
description: You may be included in this settlement if you were notified that your personal information may have been exposed in the May 2023 Norton Healthcare data breach.

title: Westlake Financial Services - Fees Class Action Settlement
description: You may be included in this settlement if you were charged a fee for making a payment on a Westlake Services account through ACI payments between June 20, 2022 and August 18, 2025.

title: Dodge Ram - EcoDiesel EGR Coolers Class Action Settlement
description: You may be covered by this settlement if you bought or leased a 2014-2019 Dodge Ram 1500 EcoDiesel truck manufactured between June 12, 2013 and October 23, 2019.

title: Mercedes-Benz - Emissions Warranty Class Action Settlement
description: If you paid out of pocket to diagnose, repair, or replace covered vehicle parts for a model year 2015 to present Mercedes-Benz vehicle between 4 years/50,000 miles and 7 years/70,000 miles, you may be included in this settlement.

title: NTN Bearing Corporation - Job Application (Illinois) Class Action Settlement
description: You may be included in this settlement if you applied for employment with NTN Bearing Corporation in Illinois and underwent a medical examination between June 19, 2019 and December 20, 2024.

title: Joint Juice Glucosamine Supplements Class Action Settlement
description: You may be able to claim a piece of this settlement if you bought any Joint Juice during various timeframes between 2009 and 2022. Time periods for affected states are listed on the settlement website.

title: Eye Physicians of Central Florida - Data Breach Class Action Settlement
description: You may be included in this settlement if your private information was compromised in the November 2023 Eye Physicians of Central Florida data breach.

description: You may be covered by this settlement if your private information was exposed in the November 2023 STS Aviation Group data breach.

title: Apex Global Solutions - Data Breach Class Action Settlement
description: If your private information was impacted in the data breach involving Apex Global Solutions in June 2024, you may be included in this settlement.

title: Nova Recovery - Data Breach Class Action Settlement
description: You may be covered by this settlement if your private information was accessed as a result of the May 2025 Nova Recovery data breach.

title: Grubhub - Delivery Fees (California) Class Action Settlement
description: If you made a food delivery order and paid for food through the Grubhub or Seamless app or website between January 24, 2019 and January 12, 2026 to a California address, you may be able to claim a piece of this settlement.

title: Nice-Pak Products - Data Breach Class Action Settlement
description: You may be included in this settlement if you received notice that your private information was potentially compromised in a data breach that affected Nice-Pak Products in May and June 2023.

description: You may be included in this settlement if you bought one or more bedding products with the Sealy name that had a listed thread count of 1250 on the packaging.

description: If your personal information was potentially compromised in a data breach discovered by Storr Office Environments in May 2024, you may be included in this settlement.

description: You may be included in this settlement if your private information was impacted by a November 2022 Eureka Casino Hotel data breach.

description: If you were an employee subjected to unlawful sexual harassment and constructive discharge while working at Nevada Restaurant Services between January 1, 2019 and October 14, 2025, you may be included in this settlement.

description: This settlement covers current and former non-exempt Box employees who worked for the company between April 1, 2019 and May 15, 2025 in NY or NJ, April 1, 2021 to May 15, 2025 in CA, or from April 1, 2022 to May 15, 2025 anywhere else in the US.

title: Saratoga Harness Racing - Data Breach Class Action Settlement
description: If your private information was compromised in the November 2024 Saratoga Harness Racing data breach, you may be included in this settlement.

description: You may be included in this settlement if you applied for a job opening with Beacon Sales Acquisition in Washington between January 1, 2023 and January 26, 2026.

description: You may be able to claim a piece of this settlement if you applied for a job with Tower Engineering Professionals, TEP Opco or TEPDB Opco in Washington between March 21, 2022 and February 12, 2026.

description: You may be included in this settlement if you worked for West Coast Self Storage outside of California between June 1, 2022 and May 15, 2025.

description: You may be covered by this settlement if you worked for Watermark Services in California between June 1, 2022 and March 31, 2025.

description: You may be included in this settlement if your personal information was compromised in the data breach Brodart discovered in October 2023.

title: Juul - Indirect Resellers Class Action Settlement
description: If you are a business that purchased Juul pods indirectly from Juul between December 1, 2018 and March 31, 2025 for resale, you may be included in this settlement.

title: Walgreens Pharmacy Services Class Action Settlement
description: This settlement covers Walgreens employees who were terminated between April 6, 2018 and April 6, 2021 who did not abandon or walk off their job; and who received their final paycheck six or more days after their termination date.

title: Cornerstone Specialty Hospitals - Data Breach Class Action Settlement
description: If you were notified by Cornerstone Specialty Hospitals of a data incident that occurred in December 2023, you may be covered by this settlement.

title: Signature Performance - Data Breach Class Action Settlement
description: If your personal information was potentially exposed in a January 2024 data breach involving Signature Performance, you may be able to claim a piece of this settlement.

description: This settlement covers current and former employees who worked for Discover Products or Discover Financial Services as hourly call center employees between January 9, 2021 and May 31, 2025.

title: Maximum Booting (Georgia) Class Action Settlement
description: This settlement covers those who owned or controlled a vehicle booted by Maximum Booting or paid for a boot to be removed by Maximum Booting in Union City, Georgia between June 15, 2012 and November 7, 2025.

title: PHH Mortgage - Default Notices Class Action Settlement
description: This settlement covers PHH residential mortgage borrowers who were sent default notices on or after January 14, 2021.

description: If your private information was impacted in the July 2025 Outcomes One data breach, you may be able to claim a piece of this settlement.

title: Institute for the International Education of Students - COVID Tuition Class Action Settlement
defendant: Institute for the International Education of Students
description: You may be included in this settlement if you were enrolled in the Spring 2020 IES Study Abroad Program for Vienna, Austria and paid IES for your tuition and housing costs.

title: Werner Enterprises - Truck Drivers Class Action Settlement
description: You may be included in this settlement if you worked for Werner Enterprises as a qualified driver between June 4, 2010 and July 14, 2023.

description: You may be included in this settlement if you applied for a job with Concentric in Washington between January 1, 2023 and March 3, 2026.

description: You may be included in this settlement if your personal information was exposed in a March 2024 Ward Transport & Logistics data breach.

description: You may be covered by this settlement if you received notice stating that your personal information was exposed in the March 2023 PharMerica data breach.

description: You may be able to claim a piece of this settlement if you were affected by the August 2024 NWRPC data breach.

description: You may be included in this settlement if your private information was compromised in the November 2024 Pediatric Home Service data breach.

description: You may be covered by this settlement if you received notice that your information may have been exposed in the January 2025 American National Bank & Trust data breach.

description: If your private information was potentially compromised in a data breach that took place at Tri Counties Bank in February 2023, you may be covered by this settlement.

description: You may be included in this settlement if your personal information was compromised in an August 2023 data breach affecting Premium Mortgage Corporation.

description: If you were incarcerated at the Monterey County Jail between May 27, 2016 and December 31, 2025, you may be able to claim a piece of this settlement.

description: You may be able to claim a piece of this settlement if your personal information was potentially compromised in the data breach Bayhealth Medical Center discovered in July 2024.

description: You may be included in this settlement if your personal information was potentially impacted in the September 2024 Highline School District No. 401 data breach.

description: You may be included in this settlement if your personal information was exposed in the July 2024 Gryphon Healthcare data breach.
